programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A Corporal in Pasco County ends up with a bloody cut on his head after subduing an aggressive suspect. Stop sticks, a K9 unit and a PIT maneuver are all deployed by police in Tulsa to stop a fleeing suspect in an allegedly stolen vehicle. Officers in Walton County find 3 pairs of women's underwear and a used condom when they search a suspect accused of assault with a vehicle.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect makes it clear he's not stopping for anyone, it's up to K9 Murphy's speed and determination to bring the chase to an end; K9 Bear's bomb-detection training is suddenly put to the test when explosives detonate in the middle of the night; after eluding police for weeks, a naked fugitive is on the run again; K9 Eddie is called in, and the pursuit ends exactly as his training predicts; and K9 Red barrels into action after a suspect crashes into a police cruiser and then tears off.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles the heat to stay on scent and close the gap.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After a father takes police on a high-speed chase with his toddler on board, K9 Keanu is deployed into a volatile standoff and every second counts. K9 Kyro tracks down the critical piece of evidence: a gun tossed by a fleeing suspect. K9 Lupo pushes through dense, punishing brush, getting tangled under low branches but refuses to quit, fighting through to make the apprehension. Meanwhile, after saving his handler's life, K9 Taco becomes more than a partner.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out a woman accused of double murder.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A Corporal in Pasco County ends up with a bloody cut on his head after subduing an aggressive suspect. Stop sticks, a K9 unit and a PIT maneuver are all deployed by police in Tulsa to stop a fleeing suspect in an allegedly stolen vehicle. Officers in Walton County find 3 pairs of women's underwear and a used condom when they search a suspect accused of assault with a vehicle.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect makes it clear he's not stopping for anyone, it's up to K9 Murphy's speed and determination to bring the chase to an end; K9 Bear's bomb-detection training is suddenly put to the test when explosives detonate in the middle of the night; after eluding police for weeks, a naked fugitive is on the run again; K9 Eddie is called in, and the pursuit ends exactly as his training predicts; and K9 Red barrels into action after a suspect crashes into a police cruiser and then tears off.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The bidders return to the city of DeSoto; Jenny seeks out raw materials; Kenny and Matt fight over industrial tools; Mary's find leads her to the state's oldest Italian restaurant.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The buyers return to Dallas; Jenny seeks industrial material for a custom job; Mary ignores the law to land a dream locker; Ricky and Bubba discover cash in the wind.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In the desert climes of Lancaster, Calif., Nabila Haniss strikes it big while Dave Hester ends up feeling like a fifth wheel.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave brings in reinforcements when the buyers attend a vault auction in Huntington Beach, Calif.; Mary attempts to hide her inexperience; Rene gets wrapped up in a tough discovery.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: An auction in Bellflower, Calif., includes big-money finds; Ivy scours through a bad buy for anything of value; Jarrod purchases a unit that forces Brandi to face her fears.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi tries to prove her worth in Jarrod's absence; the lockers in Santa Ana, Calif., yield vintage gaming machines and bottles.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene steals the units in Rancho Palos Verdes, Calif.; Mary's locker reveals a sticky past; Justin demonstrates he can turn a small investment into a big return.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers lose their minds in West Covina, Calif.; Kenny hunts for cougars, but finds a portable pulpit instead; Ivy shows the ladies how to dress for success.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: A young mother and her friend are murdered in a parking lot, sending Tulsa detectives and prosecutors on a mission to put the shooter behind bars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a rookie detective is pushed to the brink searching for a beloved man who ultimately turns up brutally murdered; after a grinding two-year investigation, bringing the killer to justice could hang on the testimony of a jailhouse informant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, there's little evidence and no clear motive after a beloved 24-year-old is gunned down in the backseat of a car; in a tragic case of mistaken identity, it's up to his friends to help detectives and prosecutors deliver justice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When an innocent bystander protecting a young woman is gunned down, detectives scramble to learn who fired the fatal shots before anyone else gets hurt.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a man is found shot to death in the back of his truck, detectives hope a dating app is the key to finding his killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Atlanta, when a young father is found dead in his home by his girlfriend, detectives track down the killer and find things are not as they appear; a Tulsa, Okla., teenager is fatally shot, sending police on a desperate search for the motive.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a man is found inside of a truck, stabbed 45 times, a bilingual Tulsa community comes together to help Detective Mark Kennedy identify the victim and track down his killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Tulsa Detective Vernon McNeal confronts a group of childhood friends to find a killer who blindly shot into a bedroom window.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a young father is gunned down at a hotel in Gwinnett County, detectives must sort through rumors and hours of surveillance video to track down his killers.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In North Charleston, Detective Corey Shaffer catches the toughest case of his career when musician and father-of-two Robert Rob Cobain Brown is found brutally murdered in his home. A year later, the trail goes cold, Shaffer's out of Homicide, and Corporal Robert Van Tine is ready to take one last shot at justice for Robert Brown.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.sub-title: Caught in a Web of Lies
programme.desc: When a predator makes a chilling request to a mom, Det. Godwin partners with the FBI to stop his sick plan. Then, a sex offender's social media signals he's looking to commit a new crime. A pre-dawn raid exposes an online pedophile ring.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A Richland County, S.C., vehicle pursuit ends in a rollover crash, as a deputy manages to subdue the suspect and save a baby at the same time; officers in El Paso, Texas find someone they know in the back seat of a car; a man in Walton County, Fla., shares his views with officers about the President, his hatred of domestic violence, and how he once got a trespassing charge at a gas station.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Berkeley County South Carolina officers go the extra mile in a high-speed chase. K9 patrol in Wilmington, North Carolina, use their dogs to sniff out a carload of potential contraband. Officers in Citrus County, Florida, track down a stolen vehicle used for suspicious activity.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In North Charleston, Detective Corey Shaffer catches the toughest case of his career when musician and father-of-two Robert Rob Cobain Brown is found brutally murdered in his home. A year later, the trail goes cold, Shaffer's out of Homicide, and Corporal Robert Van Tine is ready to take one last shot at justice for Robert Brown.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A courthouse escape goes wrong; a woman collapses after getting convicted of conspiring to kill her husband; an out-of-control defendant bites a court officer.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge is convicted of a felony and dragged from the courtroom; a man attempts to escape from a courthouse after being told he's headed to prison; a defendant pays a heavy price for a profanity-laced tirade aimed at a judge.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An inmate accused of murder makes a daring escape attempt; the judge has harsh words for a woman who pretended to have cancer as part of a scam; a man found guilty of DWI shows up 18 minutes late for his sentencing and then interrupts the hearing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: The mother of a man on trial for murder gets caught taking a picture of the jury; a defendant is held in contempt of court after flipping off the judge, twice; a judge chastises a disgraced estate attorney and more.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A grieving father asks the judge for leniency for his son who's been convicted of murdering his other son; a senior citizen spends the night in jail after continually interrupting the judge; a grieving man is removed from the courtroom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A grieving father is removed from the courtroom for cursing at his daughter's killer; a man accused of violating his parole by drinking alcohol claims he absorbed it from aftershave; a defendant breaks down crying when the judge denies her bond.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his own family decides to defend himself and cross-examine his own son; things get tense between a judge and a public defender; a surprising act of forgiveness.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Courtroom chaos ensues during an all out brawl; a bailiff risks life and limb diving down a flight of stairs chasing an escapee; a defendant threatens a judge's life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: After police discover dead bodies inside a home, a high-stakes fugitive search explodes across state lines; every heart-racing moment is captured in real-time through the raw, unflinching lens of body cameras, revealing a relentless pursuit and a killer who will stop at nothing to escape justice.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When officers in suburban Indiana respond to a potential kidnapping and murder scene, body cam captures every tense moment of the standoff with the suspect. Then in rural Colorado, a chilling investigation unfolds on camera after a mother makes a gruesome discovery in her teenage son's room. As every second ticks by, each crime unravels in real time.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: After a frantic 911 call, EMTs and sheriff's deputies rush to save the life of a mother who suddenly stopped breathing; a tense scene unfolds in real time when her partner refuses to cooperate with police; through the lenses of bodycams, every critical moment unfolds as deputies rush to discover what happened.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When a college student goes missing in suburban Georgia, a bloody discovery triggers an explosive manhunt and a dramatic chase for the truth; every moment is presented through the raw lens of bodycam as the chilling details of the case unfold in real time.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When a woman is stabbed in broad daylight in suburban Michigan, officers launch a manhunt to apprehend the attacker before they strike again.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a man targets a 13-year-old on a chat app, Det. Tony Godwin races to snare him before it is too late; a tip-off exposes a predator's collection of child sexual abuse material; an online ad sparks a bold undercover sting.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: A predator sharing pornography with a minor triggers a game of cat-and-mouse with Tony's team; then, an undercover FBI operation identifies a man who's targeting a 10-year-old; Tony takes down a predator with twisted role-play fantasies.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.sub-title: Caught in a Web of Lies
programme.desc: When a predator makes a chilling request to a mom, Det. Godwin partners with the FBI to stop his sick plan. Then, a sex offender's social media signals he's looking to commit a new crime. A pre-dawn raid exposes an online pedophile ring.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a predator with a disturbing past targets a minor, law enforcement agencies team up for a high-stakes takedown at a busy airport; then, a mom uncovers a predator's twisted scheme; detectives unmask one of their boldest predators yet.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: An all-American dad's desire for sex with a 14-year-old triggers a takedown that exposes his deviant double life. Then, creepy social media messages to a schoolgirl reveal a dangerous predator. A police officer plays decoy to lure a predator.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a predator plans to meet a 13-year-old at the mall, Detective Tony Godwin races to pull off his fastest ever takedown. Then, an FBI lead points to one home and two suspects. A predator's deviant secret is discovered in a church dumpster.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: Det. Tony Godwin catfishes a predator grooming a woman to supply her nine-year-old niece; an offender makes an admission following a tense takedown; detectives scramble to stop a predator with access to vulnerable kids.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: A registered sex offender's meet with a 13-year-old triggers a dramatic takedown at a busy gas station. Then, Tony's team exposes a grade school janitor's devious plan. Detectives join forces to snare a pastor with unholy fantasies.
